description_long: This object is a small, modern airplane positioned on a detailed runway segment. The airplane features a streamlined fuselage with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit and a pair of straight, low-mounted wings. The wings are equipped with subtle dihedral angles and lack visible winglets. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The airplane is depicted with a tricycle landing gear configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel. The runway beneath the airplane is marked with yellow and white lines, simulating a realistic airport environment.
description: A small, modern airplane with a forward cockpit, low straight wings, and a conventional tail, shown on a detailed runway segment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the airplane's low-mounted wings and the full length of the runway.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the airplane's nose, cockpit, and the tricycle landing gear on the runway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the airplane's profile and the runway's markings.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, including the single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and slight dihedral angle, no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or dual seat.
